dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the corruption runs deeper than we thought. {target_npc} found evidence that the {quest_threat} {quest_threat_has} been going on for over a decade.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The dishonored person didn't just cheat their own people. They sold secrets to rivals and blamed the leak on innocent colleagues: people whose careers were destroyed by the accusation. {quest_ally} tracked down proof at {location_hint}. {quest_item} contains the full accounting of the scheme.
dialogueChunks.outro: Get {quest_item} from {location_hint}. Every ruined life, every cheated person: all connected. The guilty party knows someone is looking and has started moving assets.

dialogueChunks.intro: The false hero found out about the investigation. They're not hiding anymore: they're attacking. Witnesses have been intimidated into silence.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} was threatened directly. Someone broke into their home and left a warning. The false hero has allies among the powerful. {quest_ally} says we need physical evidence from {quest_origin} because testimony alone won't hold against someone this influential. {quest_item} at {location_hint} contains the proof we need.
dialogueChunks.outro: The guilty party's reputation is their weapon. Every challenge to it makes them more dangerous. But the real defenders who died deserve the truth.

dialogueChunks.intro: The administrator is accelerating. Safe houses have been cleared out. Money is being moved faster than we can track.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} intercepted a courier headed to {location_hint} carrying {quest_item}: a partial accounting of where the funds actually went. Luxury goods, private guards: all purchased while the {quest_stakes} suffered. {quest_ally} says the administrator is planning to flee within days.
dialogueChunks.outro: The courier was stopped, but {quest_item} is only part of the picture. The full records are at {location_hint}. Get them before everything is destroyed.
